metadata.title: Recraft Remove Background - AI Background Remover | Marble AI
metadata.description: Recraft AI Remove Background. Accurately separates subjects from any background and delivers clean, transparent outputs for websites, eCommerce, and creative workflows. Image-to-image only.

hero.title: Recraft Remove Background
hero.description: Recraft AI's background removal tool. Accurately separate subjects from any background and deliver clean, transparent outputs for seamless integration.

introduce.title: About Recraft Remove Background
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Built by Recraft AI, the Remove Background API accurately separates subjects from any background and delivers clean, transparent outputs optimized for seamless integration.

items.title: Accurate Separation
items.description: Precisely separates subjects from backgrounds with edge-perfect accuracy.

items.title: Clean Outputs
items.description: Delivers clean, transparent outputs ready for immediate use.

items.title: Any Background
items.description: Works with any background type, from simple to complex scenes.

items.title: Seamless Integration
items.description: Optimized for websites, eCommerce platforms, and creative workflows.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Recraft Remove Background.

items.title: What is Recraft Remove Background?
items.description: Recraft Remove Background is Recraft AI's tool that accurately separates subjects from backgrounds and delivers clean, transparent outputs.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Recraft Remove Background supports Image To Image processing only, specializing in background removal.

items.title: How accurate is it?
items.description: It provides edge-perfect accuracy, even handling complex subjects like hair, fur, and intricate shapes.

items.title: What output formats are supported?
items.description: It delivers transparent PNG outputs ready for immediate use in various applications.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images processed with Recraft Remove Background through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: Is it good for e-commerce?
items.description: Yes! Recraft Remove Background is optimized for e-commerce, creating clean product images with professional results.

cta.title: Ready to Try Recraft Remove Background?
cta.description: Experience accurate background removal. Create clean, professional product images.
